program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define a synthetic-only fixture policy for RP00 control-plane examples, requiring fake tenants, users, matters, documents, financial values, and AI outputs only.
claude_questions: Does synthetic_only_fixture_policy bind to RP00.P00.M06.S01 and stay metadata-only rather than claiming migration, anonymization, production seed, or real-data import authority?
Does fixture_scope require synthetic-only, real-data-forbidden, explicit synthetic markers, allowed namespace prefixes, and allowed fixture domains?
Does the policy cover fake Tenant, User, Matter, Document, FinancialValue, and AIOutput classes with required fake markers?
Does it forbid real client, matter, document, billing, settlement, bank, tax identifier, credential, secret, production export, and customer-support attachment sources?
Do failure modes block real data, credentials/secrets, unmarked fixtures, non-synthetic financial values, and unreviewed external fixture sources before production_ready?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
